---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm HUHU, position Barista, year 10.2023-05.2024

2.  Firm SESTEK, position Transcriptionist, year 09.2023-01.2024

## Internships

1.  Firm Mercedes-Benz Türk A.Ş, position Assembly Process Planning Intern, year 07.2025-08.2025

2.  Firm Vimpo Road Construction Machines, position Production Intern, year 01.2026-02.2026

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
Basketball, Gym, Music, Coloring, Legos, Watches, Cars, Books, Cooking.
